meta.title: #9 AI for Good Specialization [Course 1, Week 1, Lesson 3]
meta.description:
The AI for Good Specialization is a three-course specialization built in collaboration with the Microsoft AI for Good lab and instructed by Robert Monarch, where you’ll learn a framework for contributing to AI-powered initiatives that drive positive change. You'll also hear from experts leading AI for Good projects that help mitigate climate change, support disaster response, and improve public health. 

The specialization is taught by Robert Monarch, author of Human-in-the-Loop Machine Learning, a disaster response professional, who now works in machine learning at Apple.

This video is from Course 1 (AI and Public Health), Week 1 (Introduction to AI for Good), Lesson 3 (Summary), Video 1 (Week 1 Summary).

To learn more and access the full course videos and assignments, enroll in the AI for Good Specialization here: https://bit.ly/44GWMqn

Follow us: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DeepLearningAIHQ/ 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/deeplearningai/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/deeplearningai_
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/deeplearningai/
